title: YAF's Colored Planks
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87a5287f521cbdddd8e2a6b85a984789c6ad41d9.png)
## Description
This mod add new Planks that it's Dyed With every Minecraft Vanilla Dye
![Colored PLanks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce21f91696beb866fa642b2d08649bbdec986953.png)
## Recipe
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/862444be029e1675b307c40872e3dd1f4f619d60.png)

You can use any Minecraft Vanilla Planks or any modded planks that have planks tag

## Modpacks
Yes, you can use this mod in your modpack.
